name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup pineapple juice, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. If the mixture is too thick, add more pineapple juice gradually until desired consistency is reached.
4. Serve immediately and garnish with ripe strawberries.
